topic: The knives in my kitchen rearrange themselves by size every night
title: The Knives in My Kitchen Rearrange Themselves by Size Every Night | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning the knives in my block are sorted by size. Smallest to largest. I never sort them.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden knife block on a kitchen counter with knives sorted small to large, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I live alone. A wooden block holds six knives on the counter.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small tidy apartment kitchen at night, a knife block on the counter, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I jam them back in any slot.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a hand jamming a knife into a wooden block at a random slot, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning they sat in perfect order. Paring knife to cleaver.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of kitchen knives arranged in a block in perfect size order, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand shuffling knives in a wooden block, dim kitchen light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning, sorted again. Blades all facing out.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of knives sorted in a block with all blades facing outward, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I hid the block in a cupboard.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden knife block placed inside a closed kitchen cupboard, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Dawn. The block was on the counter. Sorted.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of the knife block back on the counter, knives sorted, dim dawn light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then the largest knife began sitting apart. On the counter. Pointing at my bedroom door.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a large kitchen knife lying alone on a counter pointing toward a dark doorway, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I woke to a soft scraping. The blades were being lined up in the dark.
scenes.image_prompt: wide dim shot of a kitchen counter at night, knives partly arranged in a row, deep shadow, no person, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I threw every knife into the river.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dark river at night from a bank, faint moonlight on the water, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning the block was full again. Six knives, sorted, still wet.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a full knife block on a counter, the knives sorted and still wet, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
